title: Life Is Eternal Newness
author: Ilie Cioara
description: A practical book on meditation and enlightenment, a must read for any spiritual seeker. A less rational and more poetic Eckhart Tolle; Kahlil Gibran meets Krishnamurti. Ilie Cioaras message is original and unique, as he never travelled to India and never belonged to any traditional school. By practising the silence of the mind, through an all-encompassing attention, we discover and fulfill our innermost potential of becoming one with the divine spark that lies dormant within us. 'Wherever you look, All is Alive, there is Life in Everything, A leaf of grass, an insect, a human being. Even so called still nature Is a wise movement, for its Essence is the same. Everywhere in the Universe, there is One Energy, It is in fact Eternity, in perfect harmony.' Ilie Cioara
